focus: ADR-001 compliance deep audit for orphaned local weighted-walk implementation traces

traceabilityChecks.broadGrep: Searched collectWeightedWalk|computeWeightedWalk|localWeightedWalk|localWalk|weightedWalkResult across repository; hits were shared implementation, adapters/tests, docs/logs, and worktree mirror.
traceabilityChecks.implementationShapeGrep: Code-file Grep for implementation-shaped weighted/local walk definitions found only code-graph dynamic import bridge and shared bfs-traversal implementation.
traceabilityChecks.noIgnoreBackstop: No-ignore hidden/worktree rg over code files found shared source/dist, adapters, test fakes, and .worktrees mirror; no orphaned local PPR walker names survived.
traceabilityChecks.manualInspection: Inspected code-graph-context dynamic import and PPR call site, shared bfs traversal, storage adapter, test fake, and worktree mirror.

summary: Repository-wide sweep found no orphaned local weighted-walk implementation outside the shared traversal and legitimate delegates.
Hidden/no-ignore code search found a worktree mirror of the shared Memory MCP traversal, not a PPR-local duplicate.
No new P0/P1/P2 findings; no orphaned local-walker trace found.
